description: Combined index of all AI steering rules

categories.name: tool_usage
categories.description: Rules for selecting and using tools (Read, Grep, Glob, Edit, etc.)

categories.name: file_operations
categories.description: Rules for file/directory operations (create, modify, delete)

categories.name: workflow
categories.description: Rules for task execution, planning, progress tracking

categories.name: communication
categories.description: Rules for AI responses, tone, formatting

categories.name: git
categories.description: Rules for git operations (commit, push, branches)

categories.name: sdlc
categories.description: Rules for SDLC phase transitions, deliverables, gates

categories.name: artifacts
categories.description: Rules for creating documents, presentations, diagrams

categories.name: anti-patterns
categories.description: Common bad patterns to avoid (AI theater, fake limitations, etc.)

categories.name: microsites
categories.description: Rules for microsite/app development (tech stack, registries, workflows, approval, primitives, TypeScript/Python typing, HTML publishing)

categories.name: composable
categories.description: Abstract, composable, context-aware rules - like React components with traits, needs, and context resolution

categories.name: viewport-density
categories.description: Rules for viewport utility density - page type classification, VUD scoring, hero constraints, ATF content budgets

categories.name: layout-archetypes
categories.description: Machine-readable catalog of 12 page layout archetypes with required elements, skeletons, and constraints. AI must select archetype before page generation.

categories.name: layout-quality-checklist
categories.description: Binary pass/fail post-generation quality checklist for page layouts. Replaces continuous VUD scoring with 10 concrete yes/no checks.

usage.loadAll: Load all rule files to get complete ruleset
usage.loadCategory: Load specific category file for targeted rules
usage.matchContext: Filter rules by context (phase, taskType, filePattern, etc.)
usage.applyConstraints: Enforce rules based on constraint level priority
usage.generateDocs: Use generator to create markdown documentation from JSON

integration.dynamicLoading: Rules loaded on-demand based on detected context
integration.generatedDocs: Markdown guides generated from JSON source of truth

markdown.description: Generate human-readable markdown from JSON rules

validation.description: Validate all rules against JSON schema

enforcement.description: Runtime rule matching and enforcement logic
